Village → Constituency Lookup

Andhra Pradesh · SIR 2026 (2002 Roll basis)
Disclaimer — please read before use

This is an independent, unofficial, community-built tool. It is created voluntarily to assist Booth Level Officers (BLOs) and field volunteers during the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 enumeration process by helping locate the District, Assembly Constituency, and Part Number associated with a village or habitation name.

This tool is not created, endorsed, verified, or affiliated with the Election Commission of India (ECI), the Chief Electoral Officer of Andhra Pradesh, or any Government authority, in any way.

Data displayed here was extracted from publicly accessible pages of the official CEO Andhra Pradesh electoral roll portal at a point in time. It is provided "as is" without any warranty of accuracy, completeness, or currentness. Village/part boundaries, names, and constituency mappings may change, and this tool may contain errors, omissions, or outdated entries.

Users must independently verify all information on the official ECI / CEO Andhra Pradesh portal (voters.eci.gov.in or ceoaperolls.ap.gov.in) before relying on it for any official, administrative, legal, or electoral purpose. This tool must not be treated as a substitute for official electoral records under any circumstance.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, the creator(s) and contributor(s) of this tool disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential loss, damage, error, omission, delay, or inconvenience arising out of or in connection with the use, misuse, or inability to use this tool, or reliance placed on any information presented herein. Use of this tool is entirely at your own risk and discretion.

This is a free, non-commercial tool offered in good faith to support the SIR enumeration effort. No data entered by you (search queries) is collected, stored, or transmitted anywhere — all lookups happen locally in your browser.

Step 1 — Select District Step 2 — Type Village / Part Name
Type at least 2 letters. e.g. "Koduru"
💡 No results? This is 2002-era data — old spellings often differ from today's. Try swapping "n" ↔ "m" before a consonant (e.g. Konduru → Komduru, Kondapalli → Komdapalli, Chandragudem → Chamdragudem). Also try shorter fragments, dropping silent letters, or common variants like v↔w, b↔v.
Search across all 13 districts of AP
Use this if you don't know the district yet. Type at least 3 letters.
💡 No results? This is 2002-era data — old spellings often differ from today's. Try swapping "n" ↔ "m" before a consonant (e.g. Konduru → Komduru, Kondapalli → Komdapalli, Chandragudem → Chamdragudem). Also try shorter fragments, dropping silent letters, or common variants like v↔w, b↔v.
Unofficial, independent, non-commercial community tool · Built to support SIR 2026 BLOs & volunteers
Data sourced from CEO Andhra Pradesh public portal · Not affiliated with ECI or Government of India/AP
Always cross-check on the official portal before final submission
